header.reference: FROZEN CANONICAL corpus distribution — all downstream fingerprinting scores against this
excludes: song_0014 (generated, not a real corpus song)
header.scoring: percentile(v) = 100 * mean(values <= v) using the per-axis 'values' array (empirical CDF)
header.split_axes_note: genre_conditioned holds per-genre breakpoints for axes that split by genre
header.regenerate_with: python3 build_canonical_distribution.py (deliberate only — changes all coordinates)
